description:
2025 Porsche Cayenne GTS Coupe, 4.0 TC V8, 4WD, 493bbhp, 8-Speed PDK. AED 549,000 or AED 8,601 / Month with a 20% Down payment for 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 16,233 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until 18th January 2027 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Satin PPF - 22-Inch Alloy Wheels - Sports Exhaust - Sports Chrono Package - Bose Sound System - Electric Memory Seats - Thermally and Noise Insulated Glass - Alcantara Steering Wheel - Surround View with Active Parking Support - Four-Zone Automatic Climate Control - Wireless Apple Carplay - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation
